name: AI provenance manifest: emitted JSON contains all top-level fields per §2.8 schema (commit, timestamp, author_human, ai_involvement, rubric_state, standards_state, pr_corpus_state, compliance_state, human_review, cost_telemetry, decision_provenance, signature)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/provenance-emit.sh" --commit-sha abc123 && for k in commit timestamp author_human ai_involvement rubric_state standards_state pr_corpus_state compliance_state human_review cost_telemetry decision_provenance signature; do grep -E "\"$k\":" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL missing $k" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
